query: extreme overexposure blown out highlights white sky photograph
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — overexposed/blown highlights, silhouettes against white sky, washed-out high-key minimalism

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph showing dark silhouettes of people positioned along the bottom edge of the frame against an expansive bright background. Several individuals walk or stand spaced apart across the terrain, while small groups sit on benches to the left and right. The human figures occupy only a narrow strip at the base, leaving the majority of the image as negative space above them.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white photograph using extreme overexposure that reduces the majority of the frame to pure white, with dark silhouettes of people visible only along the bottom edge. Several individuals walk or stand spaced apart, while small groups sit on benches to the left and right. The blown-out highlights eliminate environmental detail, creating a stark minimalist composition dominated by negative space.
